creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
Hi, sorry for disappearing for so long :(

That last shar file Olli posted (mod_authnz_crowd_201306252005.shar) =
works great. The only addition I have is a pkg-message file to help =
usage:

--cut here--
To enable mod_authnz_crowd, you must ensure that the subversion DAV =
modules
are enabled and loaded first, like this:

LoadModule dav_svn_module     libexec/apache22/mod_dav_svn.so
LoadModule authz_svn_module   libexec/apache22/mod_authz_svn.so
Include etc/apache22/Includes/zzz_authnz_crowd.conf
--cut here--

Thanks!
